settings.title:
Restored, refreshed,
brought back to life.
settings.sub: Drop your unit at the studio (or ship it in). We'll deep clean, repair, recolor, or fully reconstruct — whatever it needs.

settings.title:
Treatments,
by appointment.
settings.intro: Every service includes consultation, photo proof of work, and gentle return shipping. Most turnarounds are five to seven days.

settings.name: The Wig Spa
settings.desc: Full deep cleanse, condition, and refresh. Removes product buildup, restores softness, returns natural movement.

settings.name: Wig Reconstruction
settings.desc: Re-wefting, density restoration, full polish. For units that need more than a wash.

settings.name: Lace Replacement
settings.desc: Fresh HD or transparent lace, re-tinted to match your skin. Like new, hidden line.

settings.name: Color Refresh
settings.desc: Recolor, gloss, or full transformation. Includes shade consultation.

settings.name: Bring Your Own Bundles
settings.desc: You provide the hair, we'll build the unit. Custom cap construction, lace install, and styling included.

settings.heading: Photo proof at every step
settings.body: Before, during, after. You see exactly what we're doing to your investment.

settings.heading: Gentle 14-step wash
settings.body: Sulfate-free, pH-balanced, and weighted to preserve cuticle alignment.

settings.heading: Express return shipping
settings.body: Insured, tracked, and packaged the way you'd expect us to package it.

settings.title: Send us your unit.
settings.sub: Tell us what your unit needs, drop a photo, and we'll come back with a timeline and a quote within twenty-four hours.
settings.fineprint: Most services turn around in 5-7 business days.
